role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation density, and road quality consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed forest types (broadleaf, dipterocarp) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road markings, bollards, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (camera generation, specific marker styles) effectively.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the ground truth. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, and the tournament logic effectively used the specific visual evidence (the delineator post) to distinguish between the top candidates.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of the forest and road match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of the vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the bollard and road markings match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the camera quality and marker style match the image.
